mine.title: Shipping AI-Powered React Native Apps
mine.description: One line about what this talk covered.

favorites.title: React for Two Computers
favorites.speaker: Dan Abramov
favorites.description: Dan rethinking React's mental model across the server/client boundary.

favorites.title: Introducing Universal React Server Components in Expo Router
favorites.speaker: Evan Bacon
favorites.description: Server components running universally across native and web with Expo Router.

favorites.title: Bridging, Compiling, and Rendering: How Cross-Platform Frameworks Work
favorites.speaker: Mohamed Rejeb
favorites.description: What actually happens under the hood of cross-platform frameworks.

favorites.title: Composition Is All You Need
favorites.speaker: Fernando Rojo
favorites.description: Why composition beats configuration in React APIs.

favorites.title: Worklets Everywhere: Multithreading in React Native
favorites.speaker: Tomasz Żelawski
favorites.description: Running JS off the main thread with worklets across React Native.

favorites.title: Live React: Hot Reloading with Time Travel
favorites.speaker: Dan Abramov
favorites.description: The legendary live demo that introduced Redux and hot reloading to the world.

favorites.title: React from Another Dimension
favorites.speaker: Dan Abramov
favorites.description: What if React had been invented on the server first? A thought experiment.

favorites.title: Async React
favorites.speaker: Ricky Hanlon
favorites.description: The React team on async rendering and what it unlocks.
